text: A white bathroom with brick walls and a large window.
A kitten is laying in a pale near grass and tree leaves.
Some scissors sit on a table next to some pieces.
A gathering of individuals are uncovered before the open day.
Some animals grazing in a big grassy field.
Doorway view of bathroom with a tub, sink and window.

A road sign indicating a turn with a construction sign attached.
A base ballplayer throwing a baseball while running..
